data.body: Implemented + independently code-reviewed (subagent). v2 schema adds branch/loop/map (additionalProperties:false, oneOf exactly-one discriminator, mandatory max_iterations, while/until mutually exclusive); v1->v2 pure-version-bump shim + golden round-trip; frame-scoped linter (per-frame acyclic needs, no cross-frame edges, loop.<var>/map.<as> bindings, map 'as' scoped to body, same-frame ref precedence). lint.py split into lint_refs.py (frame linter) + lint.py (secret/prompt/collector) along call-graph seam; both under 800 LOC. Reviewer: no blockers; 1 MINOR (shadowed-id false-negative) fixed+regression-tested. 200 tests pass, ruff clean. Commit 2b38ad5d.
